name: expense-tracker
description: A modern expense tracking application with React frontend and Node.js backend

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ..
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.start:prod: cross-env NODE_ENV=production cd backend && npm start
scripts.prod: npm run build && npm run start:prod
